title: Faster Hoppers (optimiser + speed)
description: This plugin introduces a brand new optimisation for servers with ultra laggy hoppers: this plugin is updated frequently and has a Discord server if you need help
body:
# ⏩ Hopper Optimiser / Speed

Hopper Optimiser improves performance of hoppers on Spigot servers. This plugin reduces the lag caused by hopper systems while keeping behaviour somewhat similar to vanilla, although it adds extra things such as being able to increase the speed.

Redstone still works as expected. Farms still function normally. The thing that changes is behind the screens.

---

# 🚀 Performance Improvements

The plugin optimises item transfer handling to reduce strain on server resources.

Hoppers remain consistent with vanilla logic, but with less TPS and processor usage. This makes a big difference on servers with:

* Storage systems
* Item sorters
* Farms
* High player activity

Speed settings are configurable, so you can decide how closely it follows vanilla behaviour versus how much optimisation you want.

---

# 📦 Crafter Distribution

Hopper Optimiser also includes accurate distribution for crafters.

**Speed 9**

* Distributes 1 item evenly into each slot

**Speed 10**

* Distributes 1 item into each slot
* Continues to bring 1 to the first slot

This ensures predictable behaviour for item farms and automation setups.

---

# ⚙️ Configuration

The config is simple. No unneeded settings.

You can adjust and/or toggle:
* If optimisation is enabled
* Crafter speed
* Item transfer amount
* Transfer cooldown (transfer frequency)
* Check interval (ticks between for checking items)

It’s designed to be easy to set up and maintain.

---

# 📈 Ideal For

* Survival servers
* Economy servers
* Creative servers
* Any server with lag related to hoppers

If hopper activity is a major part of your CPU usage, this plugin is worth trying.

---

# 💬 Support

The plugin is updated and maintained by just one developer.

For bugs, suggestions, or help, [join our Discord server.](https://discord.gg/Vtxdn9guAQ)

---

Hopper Optimiser focuses on one thing, reducing hopper lag without changing gameplay and maintaining speeds from older plugins you may have had.
